title: Chile Initiates Public Consultation for Updated 2026-2030 Green Hydrogen Strategy
content: The Ministry of Energy in Chile has launched a public consultation for the "Update of the National Green Hydrogen Strategy 2026-2030," open for comments until February 15, 2026. Building on the 2020 State policy, this document outlines guidelines for a competitive industry focused on decarbonization, economic growth, and energy security. Bi-minister of Energy and Economy, Ãlvaro GarcÃ­a, emphasized the strategy's continuity but noted a strategic shift to prioritize domestic demand alongside international export opportunities. Supported by the IDB, CORFO, and the Strategic Committee, the update focuses on three key pillars: developing the domestic market, establishing a new export sector, and ensuring governance for local value generation. Observations collected via the Ministryâ€™s website will be integrated into the final document, scheduled for publication in March 2026.
author: Analysts Account
source: Ministry of Energy, Government of Chile
